title: Highlight edge endpoints when opening a label popup
description: When an interactive auth, dataflow, boundary, permission, or validation edge label is selected, highlight the edge's source and target components until the popup closes.
decision_notes: Resolve endpoints from the clicked edge group's data-from and data-to attributes so all interactive edge badge types share one behavior.
Use a dedicated blue outline and glow instead of changing semantic edge colors.
Clear endpoint highlights whenever the popup closes through outside click, Escape, repeated activation, disposal, or rerender.
verification: Browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/: selecting Login-to-Checkout JWT highlighted exactly Login and Checkout with rgb(37, 99, 235), then cleared both on close
